query:
SELECT id, name FROM establishments 
WHERE status = 'pending' 
  AND (description IS NULL OR description = '')
  AND (
    name LIKE '% - Restaurante%' OR name LIKE '% - Bar %' OR name LIKE '% - Café%'
    OR name LIKE '% - Pizzaria%' OR name LIKE '% - Hamburgueria%' OR name LIKE '% - Padaria%'
    OR name LIKE '% - Lanchonete%' OR name LIKE '% - Confeitaria%' OR name LIKE '% - Sorveteria%'
  )
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute 
SELECT id, name FROM establishments 
WHERE status = 'pending' 
  AND (description IS NULL OR description = '')
  AND (
    name LIKE '% - Restaurante%' OR name LIKE '% - Bar %' OR name LIKE '% - Café%'
    OR name LIKE '% - Pizzaria%' OR name LIKE '% - Hamburgueria%' OR name LIKE '% - Padaria%'
    OR name LIKE '% - Lanchonete%' OR name LIKE '% - Confeitaria%' OR name LIKE '% - Sorveteria%'
  )
LIMIT 10;
